surface: Codex in-app browser against a local HTTP server

checks.evidence: Registration required both agreements, issued a server session, and restored the authenticated session after a full page reload.
Free, Plus, and Pro were shown; Plus and Pro both remained marked as unavailable for purchase.
The server-issued Internal Tester identity persisted after reload and the panel explicitly stated that it does not include administrator privileges.
The workspace header displayed exactly one Internal Tester tier badge after redemption and reload.
Joining the waitlist changed the status to waiting while the UI continued to state that the PINN solver was not enabled.
The account and entitlement panel remained usable at all three required CSS viewports. Screenshots retain the browser device scale factor and therefore have larger physical pixel dimensions.
